creator: roots_bg@yahoo.com
text:
I'm running FreeBSD 7BETA2 with linux_base-f7. Sometimes (I can't tell
when skype_devel starts to eat the whole CPU time, killing skype_devel
and starting it again fixes the problem.

How-To-Repeat: install skype_devel with linux_base-f7. Left the skype being active for
some time let's say 4 hours and work normally with the Desktop. Browsing
listening music etc.
